title: Flooded
description: It's raining. The water level is rising...
body:
# Description

A (proof of concept) mod that makes the entire world slowly flood while it's raining.

I never had time to work on this mod further than the initial proof of concept test release, so it's not that useful in its current state.

The main issues with this initial test release are:

* ~~There is no global water level tracking yet, which would apply the water level to chunks as they get loaded. Currently the update just happens in chunks that are currently loaded.~~ Wait is there? The code looks like it maybe has that already...
* The water level updates and block updates are rather laggy
* The custom water blocks don't currently behave that well with things like boats

# Showcase

The mod was originally shown off here:

https://old.reddit.com/r/feedthebeast/comments/7zjd3i/its_raining_the_water_level_is_rising/
